title: Assistant Store Manager - Burger King India South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Burger King India South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Burger King India South Asia Partners in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Burger King India South Asia Partners:
Burger King India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India South Asia Partners!
